title: TagSet - Metadata API

description.description: A description of the tag set.

label.description: Label that identifies the tag set in the Salesforce user interface.

name.description: The unique name of the tag set. Can contain only underscores and alphanumeric characters and must be unique in your org. It must begin with a letter, not include spaces, not end with an underscore, and not contain two consecutive underscores.

options.description: A list of options associated with the tag set.

properties.description: A list of properties associated with the tag set.

tags.description: A list of tags included in this tag set.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Tag">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="label" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="name" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="options" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:TagOption"/>
        <xsd:element name="properties" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:TagProperty"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="TagOption">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="name" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="value" type="xsd:boolean"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="TagProperty">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="name" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="value" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="TagSet">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="label" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="name" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="options" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:TagOption"/>
        <xsd:element name="properties" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:TagProperty"/>
        <xsd:element name="tags" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:Tag"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
